from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about a comics character (or related entities)
    into a single fluent sentence.  Each known predicate is rendered with a
    natural‑language template; unknown predicates fall back to a simple
    “subject predicate object” wording.
    """
    # Mapping of predicate to a template string; placeholders are {subject} and {object}
    templates = {
        "alternativeName": "{subject} is also known as {object}",
        "creator": "{subject} was created by {object}",
        "fullName": "{subject}'s full name is {object}",
        "foundedBy": "{subject} was founded by {object}",
        "keyPerson": "{object} is a key person at {subject}",
        "city": "{subject} is located in {object}",
        "product": "{subject} produces {object}",
        "lastAired": "{subject} last aired on {object}",
        "starring": "{subject} stars {object}",
        "firstAppearanceInFilm": "{subject} first appeared in the film {object}",
        "voice": "{subject} is voiced by {object}",
        "distributor": "The film {subject} was distributed by {object}",
        "birthPlace": "{subject} was born in {object}",
        "nationality": "{subject} is {object}",
        "award": "{subject} received the {object}",
        "broadcastedBy": "{subject} was broadcasted by {object}",
        "firstAired": "{subject} first aired on {object}",
        "series": "{subject} is part of the series {object}",
        "child": "{subject} has a child named {object}",
    }

    clauses = []
    for triple in triples:
        tmpl = templates.get(triple.predicate)
        # Clean object string: remove surrounding quotes if present
        obj_clean = triple.object.strip()
        if (obj_clean.startswith('"') and obj_clean.endswith('"')) or (obj_clean.startswith("'") and obj_clean.endswith("'")):
            obj_clean = obj_clean[1:-1]
        if tmpl:
            clause = tmpl.format(subject=triple.subject, object=obj_clean)
        else:
            # Fallback for unexpected predicates
            clause = f"{triple.subject} {triple.predicate} {obj_clean}"
        clauses.append(clause)

    if not clauses:
        return ""

    # Join clauses into a single sentence; use commas and a final period.
    sentence = ", ".join(clauses)
    # Capitalize first character
    sentence = sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:] + "."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
